title: Add PES RosehipV1: Precision Error Signal + frontier stack
author: Tetrahedroned
body: Novel architecture submission. Introduces PES (Precision Error Signal) — lightweight inter-layer correction module inspired by the biological Rosehip neuron. Full frontier stack: XSA, VRL, EMA, LeakyReLU². val_bpb pending scored run. Smoke test passes on CPU. README includes full training dynamics documentation.
